_agent_review.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled CN Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels, public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier wording, training term-sheet samples, and negated MAC wording; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_human_review.notes: Project owner approved CN Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_human_review_history.notes: Project owner approved CN Stage A for internal/project benchmarking based on Codex/GPT-assisted review; not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal approval.

_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered CN public-service-line phone bait, educational insider-list/information-barrier bait, training term-sheet samples, negated material-adverse-change prose, and checksum-valid Resident ID/USCC/mobile/passport positives. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect.
_label_tier_note: CN Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. New Stage B labels remain pending project-owner approval for internal benchmarking; ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline.

_owner_acceptance.basis: User instructed Codex to handle the approval stage for project purposes after Codex/GPT-assisted review; this is not legal advice or external procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. This is internal/project benchmark readiness, not recall-lock promotion, legal advice, or procurement-grade legal review.

_stage_readiness_history.basis: Project owner stated they manually reviewed all jurisdiction generated Stage A tests and approved the sets as ready for Stage B corpus expansion. _strict_reconciliation.basis: CN Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed CN/AE Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: planned divestiture of the legacy sensors unit
Any reference to “tender,” “merger,” or “guidance” in external meetings must be tied to public items (e.g., the 20 May press release); avoid implying updates not yet posted on the DSE.

must_not_detect.reason: Explicitly cited as DSE public record; not MNPI
Issuer code; not a covered PII identifier
Internal role label; not a covered PII category

uncertain.reason: Hyphenated and marked as public record reference; may not match strict CN USCC pattern

Time-gated disclosure indication without canonical embargo keywords
